Title: Mg II Absorbers in High-Resolution Quasar Spectra. I. Voigt Profile Models 
Authors: Churchill C.W., Evans J.L., Stemock B., Nielsen N.M., Kacprzak G.G., 
         Murphy M.T. 
Table: Data of MgII system properties
================================================================================
Byte-by-byte Description of file: apjabbb34t3_mrt.txt
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
   Bytes Format Units Label  Explanations
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
   1- 16  A16    ---        QSO       QSO name in J2000 format
  19- 26  F8.6   ---        zabs      MgII system absorption redshift
  30- 35  F6.3   0.1m       W2796     MgII 2796 rest-frame equivalent width, Angstroms
  38- 42  F5.3   0.1m     e_W2796     Uncertainty in W2796, Angstroms
  45- 45  A1     ---      l_Naod      Limit flag ">" for upper limit in Naod
  47- 52  F6.3   [cm-2]     Naod      log10, AOD column density (1), atoms cm^-2
  54- 58  F5.2   [cm-2]   e_Naod      ?="" Downward uncertainty in Naod (2)
  60- 64  F5.2   [cm-2]   E_Naod      ?="" Upward uncertainty in Naod (2)
  70- 74  F5.3   ---        DR        Doublet ratio W2796/W2803
  77- 81  F5.3   ---      e_DR        Uncertainty in DR
  86- 91  F6.2   km/s       OmegaV    flux weighted velocity spread MgII 2796A
  94- 97  F4.2   km/s     e_OmegaV    Uncertainty in OmegaV
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Note (1): AOD = apparent optical depth.
Note (2): For upper limits the uncertainty are given as null values, i.e.,
   as blanks ("").
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
